text:
There was once a boy who got lost in the forest.

He wandered back and forth. He stopped to listen. He'd hear rustling. Eventually, he'd just keep going until morning.

That's when he'd discover something fascinating.

There was always something else hungry. Maybe a turtle. Maybe something much bigger. But never him.

Every time he felt scared, he just knew there'd be a big fox snuffling around.

And then he'd find fox teeth. Only teeth. They'd look...kind of cool. So he'd collect them.

And everyone loved fox teeth. They had a nice sense of humor.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
